mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DEVICE_ID AS deviceId, COMMAND AS command, PARAMS AS params, IDEMPOTENCY_KEY AS idempotencyKey, STATUS AS status, RETRY_COUNT AS retryCount, MAX_RETRIES AS maxRetries, ACKED_AT AS ackedAt, CREATED_DATE AS createdDate FROM dm_command_log
AND DEVICE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceId}, '%')
AND COMMAND LIKE CONCAT('%', #{command}, '%')
AND STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY CREATED_DATE DESC
